contexts.context: …PDF file. I see that you’ve mentioned the <mark>while-do</mark> function. One reason we introduced this function was…
…thought of simple examples that cannot be realized with <mark>while-do</mark> or are much harder without generators.
…feeding this into other things and chaining. The <mark>while-do</mark> function has the logic in the callback function.…
…Many of the generator functions are inspired by the <mark>while-do</mark> function.
CG introduces the rational for creating <mark>while-do</mark> and do-until instead of iterate-while. It allows…
…something that would be very handy. I think <mark>while-do</mark> should be renamed to just while.
Issue #1389: fn:<mark>while-do</mark>: Optional error: will not terminate
